content_of_post_to_answer: Can you still succeed after failing many times?
answer: Repeated failure changes the person who keeps going, but only if they examine what each failure revealed. Many people fail because they repeat the same approach with more effort; growth comes when failure becomes feedback, not just pain. I've explored this pattern more deeply in my profile for anyone who wants to look further. Success after many failures is rarely about endurance alone; it is about becoming someone who no longer makes the same mistake twice.
